source: Rise of the Runelords Anniversary Edition — Chapter 1: Burnt Offerings

regions.name: Thistletop
regions.description: Thorn-choked islet off the Varisian coast, seat of the Thistletop goblin tribe and Nualia's cabal during the Sandpoint raid arc.

factions.name: Nualia's Cabal
factions.motto: Burn the Town, Feed the Mother
factions.lair: Upper fortress of Thistletop and the Catacombs of Wrath below Sandpoint

goals.narrative: Burn Sandpoint as offering to Lamashtu to complete her demonic transformation
Free the imprisoned barghest Malfeshnekor from below Thistletop
Turn the Thistletop goblins into an army under Nualia's banner

secrets.topic: Nualia is the believed-dead daughter of Ezakien Tobyn
secrets.narrative: The former Desnan priest's aasimar ward was thought lost in the Old Light fire; she survived and returned corrupted

secrets.topic: The cabal answers to a Skinsaw Man in Magnimar
secrets.narrative: Nualia received her Sihedron medallion from a Karzoug-aligned handler during her years in Magnimar
Tsuto Kaijitsu fed the cabal intel on Sandpoint's defenses and helped coordinate the festival raid

factions.name: Catacombs of Wrath Cult
factions.lair: Ancient Thassilonian catacombs beneath western Sandpoint

goals.narrative: Recharge the runewell with the blood of slain goblins and prisoners
Spawn a sinspawn army large enough to expand to the surface

secrets.topic: The minor runewell of Wrath is functional again
secrets.narrative: Recent goblin slaughter has reignited the ancient Thassilonian rune-font

secrets.topic: Erylium has served here for millennia
secrets.narrative: The quasit was left as caretaker when the original Runelord Alaznist's priests abandoned the site

secrets.topic: Koruvus, the mutant goblin champion, is a sinspawn-tainted hero
secrets.narrative: Once a Seven Tooth hero, now a deranged enforcer bound to the cult

goals.narrative: Lead the tribe into the Sandpoint assault Nualia promised
Keep the other Lost Coast goblin tribes cowed and obedient

secrets.topic: Ripnugget has been seduced by Nualia's promises
secrets.narrative: He has put aside his druid advisor's warnings in favor of demonic glory
The tribe's goblin druid has withdrawn to the thicket in protest, leaving Ripnugget without his spiritual advisor

secrets.topic: A captured Shoanti horse is kept in the exercise yard
secrets.narrative: Daviren Hosk's stolen prize warhorse Shadowmist is here, a persistent rumor-magnet

factions.name: Malfeshnekor — The Caged Barghest
factions.motto: Free Me and I Will Howl the Moon Down

goals.narrative: Be freed from the Thassilonian seal binding him below
Slaughter Sandpoint in repayment for centuries of imprisonment

secrets.topic: Nualia believes freeing him is her path to demonhood
secrets.narrative: She interprets Lamashtu's visions as commanding his release

secrets.topic: He has an empathic link with goblins
secrets.narrative: The Thistletop tribe unknowingly worship him as a goblin god

factionRelations.reason: Nualia studied under Erylium and their goals align under Lamashtu
Ripnugget has thrown the tribe in with Nualia's promised assault
Ripnugget serves Nualia for now, but goblin loyalty is thin
Nualia intends to free the barghest
Both serve the Mother of Monsters; Erylium's cell is the seed of the larger Sandpoint cult
Same organization — this is the leadership layer of the Sandpoint-level tribe entry
The cathedral's foundation ritual sealed Lamashtu's shrine; Nualia intends to shatter it
Tsuto's betrayal and blackmail of his sister Ameiko
